community_pulse: The carnivore community is split between chasing viral transformation content and grappling with real sustainability issues—weight loss plateaus, cholesterol concerns, and budget constraints are dominating practical conversations while mega-creators capture massive views with lifestyle content.

topics.title: Why Your Carnivore Weight Loss Stopped (And It's Not What You Think)
topics.angle: Move beyond calorie counting—explore metabolic adaptation, electrolyte imbalances, and hidden carb sources that actually stall progress on carnivore specifically
topics.why_now: Weight loss plateau is trending on YouTube this week; people are actively searching for answers mid-journey

topics.title: The Cholesterol Question Nobody's Answering: LDL on Carnivore (What the Data Actually Shows)
topics.angle: Cut through the fear-mongering—present the nuanced research on LDL particle size, apoB, and why total cholesterol numbers alone miss the full picture for carnivores
topics.why_now: Cholesterol and LDL concerns are a trending search; new people are scared, existing practitioners are confused

topics.title: Ground Beef Nation: 7 High-Volume, Low-Cost Carnivore Meals Under $3/Serving
topics.angle: Stop pretending carnivore has to be expensive—practical recipes and sourcing strategies for people eating on a real budget without sacrificing nutrition
topics.why_now: Budget ground beef meals are trending; shows interest in making carnivore accessible and sustainable long-term

topics.title: The Viral Transformation Trap: Why Those 'Before & Afters' Might Not Tell You the Whole Story
topics.angle: Real talk on consumption of viral carnivore content—what gets hidden in transformation videos, realistic timelines, and how to spot greenwashing in the carnivore space
topics.why_now: This week's mega-viral content (4M+ views) is driving inflated expectations; community needs grounding in reality

topics.title: Carnivore Meal Prep Hacks: 3-Hour Sunday Strategy for Busy Professionals
topics.angle: Structured system for batch cooking that works specifically for carnivore (storage, reheating, variety without complexity)
topics.why_now: Meal prep is trending as people look for sustainability and structure; practical content complements the viral excitement

topics.title: The Beginner's Honest First 30 Days: What Actually Happens (Not the Highlight Reel)
topics.angle: Raw breakdown of adaptation period—the fatigue, cravings, digestion weirdness, and mental fog people don't talk about before the 'glow-up' starts
topics.why_now: Beginner guides are trending; new audience needs realistic expectations, not just inspirational stories

topics.title: Dr. Chaffee vs. The YouTube Algorithm: Why Quiet Science Outperforms Viral Drama Long-Term
topics.angle: Media analysis on the two-tier content ecosystem in carnivore—what creators like Dr. Chaffee and Dr. Berry are building vs. what goes viral and why it matters
topics.why_now: Clear contrast between viral mega-content and steady educational creators this week; timely to discuss strategy and trust

topics.title: Carnivore Performance for Athletes: Beyond Weight Loss (Strength, Endurance, Recovery)
topics.angle: Shift from transformation metrics to actual performance gains—data on VO2 max, strength retention, and recovery speed for carnivore athletes
topics.why_now: Performance-focused creators (Core Instinct, iRick Wiggins) gaining traction; audience interested in carnivore beyond aesthetics

topics.title: Electrolytes on Carnivore: The Supplement You're Probably Dosing Wrong
topics.angle: Specific carnivore electrolyte protocol tied to common plateau and adaptation issues—sodium, potassium, magnesium ratios that actually work
topics.why_now: Supports weight loss plateau and beginner guides trending; practical intervention people are searching for
